calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Isabel Wiskind, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. At the request of self-represented plaintiff, the Court ordered the case dismissed. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set July 24, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Continued To Mar-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Continued To Dec-12-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Della Santina(415-342-5500) for Plaintiff/moving party Isabel Wiskind.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ISABEL WISKIND'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not Reported (D501)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JOE DELLA SANTINA'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF ISABEL WISKIND.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR. Counsel failed to use Mandatory Form MC-052. The non-complaint declaration filed in lieu of form MC-052 appears to address a different action. See Declaration of Joe Della Santina referencing Ms. Wiskind as Defendant; fully executed settlement agreement; and masking. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: A.K. Abraham, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to October 24, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Depatment 610. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Continued To Jun-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joe Della Santina, Esq. (415-342-5500) especially appearing for for Plaintiff/ opposing party Isabel Wiskind.
Nabeel Zuberi, Esq. (562-983-5375) for Defendant/Moving party WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.through Court Call.

Plaintiff informs the Court he will be representing the Plaintiff. The Court orders the attorney to file his substitution papers. Both sides ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. Parties to comply with the new rule re: substantive meet and confer to try and resolve the matter. Plaintiff to file substitution of attorney papers. The Court approves the request of Plaintiff to file an amended complaint. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
